title: EDITOR_CURSOR constant isn't wired into the editor URL resolver
body: PrettyPageHandler defines const EDITOR_CURSOR = "cursor" alongside EDITOR_VSCODE and the others, but setting the editor option to 'cursor' doesn't produce a working click-to-open link the way 'vscode' or 'phpstorm' do, suggesting the resolver map is missing an entry for it.

title: JsonResponseHandler's jsonApi mode doesn't set the json:api Content-Type
body: Calling setJsonApi(true) changes the response body shape to errors[[]] to match the json:api spec, but the handler still doesn't appear to set the Content-Type header to application/vnd.api+json, so strict json:api clients reject the response.

title: Run::register can be invoked twice, registering duplicate handlers
body: Calling Run::register() a second time (e.g. from two different bootstrap files that both try to be defensive) doesn't seem to check the $isRegistered flag before calling set_error_handler/set_exception_handler again, resulting in each error being reported twice.

title: Document the expected format for silencedPatterns
body: Run.php has a private $silencedPatterns array typed as list<array{patterns: string, levels: int}> in the psalm annotation, but there's no public documentation or example showing how to call the method that populates it or what 'patterns' actually matches against (file path? message?).

title: XmlResponseHandler doesn't escape frame arguments containing angle brackets
body: When an exception's stack frame arguments include a string containing raw '<' or '>' characters (e.g. a failed HTML-parsing call), XmlResponseHandler's generated XML document becomes invalid because those characters aren't escaped before being embedded as element content.
